settings.text: Share information about your brand with your customers. Describe a product, make announcements, or welcome customers to your store.

settings.custom_liquid: Trustpilot

<script>
  (function() {
    // Run once the page is ready
    function initForceEnable() {
      // Use the exact form ID from your rendered HTML
      const form = document.querySelector('#BuyButtons-ProductForm-template--26062136967493__main');
      if (!form) return;

      const btn = form.querySelector('button[type="submit"][name="add"]');
      if (!btn) return;

      const forceEnable = () => {
        btn.disabled = false;
        btn.removeAttribute('disabled');
        btn.removeAttribute('aria-disabled');

        // Clean up any visual "disabled" state
        btn.classList.remove('is-disabled', 'loading', 'sold-out', 'personalisation-required');
        btn.style.opacity = '';
        btn.style.cursor = '';
      };

      // Enable immediately
      forceEnable();

      // Watch for any attempt to disable the button and undo it
      const observer = new MutationObserver(() => {
        forceEnable();
      });

      observer.observe(btn, {
        attributes: true,
        attributeFilter: ['disabled', 'aria-disabled', 'class', 'style']
      });
    }

    if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
      document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', initForceEnable);
    } else {
      initForceEnable();
    }
  })();
</script>
